design_style: Bento Box UI / Vibrant Neo-Pop / Modern Playful Modular

typography.body_font_style: Regular Clean Sans-Serif / System Default UI Font
text_effects: Mixed emphasis using bolding and italicization (e.g., 'Blog')
High-contrast scale shifting between titles and subtitles

geometry: Perfect circles for avatars and minimal icons
textures: Faint dashed and curved vector paths in backgrounds
Localized blurred glow effects (middle card target)
motifs: Minimalist, semi-transparent icon enclosures (top left of cards)
Stacked UI layers creating false 3D depth
Hashtag and link UI syntax for metadata

compositional_rules.spacing: Strict, uniform external grid gutters paired with generous internal breathing room
compositional_rules.depth: 2.5D stacking achieved via soft drop shadows, overlapping translucent cards, and high-contrast foreground/background separation
compositional_rules.hierarchy: Visual weight dictated by container volume, bold solid colors, and massive typographic anchors
compositional_rules.alignment: Rigid macro grid structure with variable internal alignment (flush-left for text blocks, absolute-centered for profile avatars)
